title: alter table my_merge_table drop table t1; crashes mserver5 with Segmentation fault
key_bug_features: alter table drop table causes segmentation fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT, value FLOAT CHECK (value >= 0));
ALTER TABLE my_merge_table DROP TABLE t1;
